scripts.check: pnpm run docs:check && pnpm run spellcheck && pnpm run docs:refs && pnpm run docs:links && pnpm run config:check && pnpm run specs:check && pnpm run web:interface-check && pnpm run skill:test && pnpm run -r typecheck && pnpm run -r test && pnpm run rust:check
scripts.config:check: node tools/check-deployment-env.mjs && node --test tools/check-deployment-env.test.mjs tools/check-gallery-local-config.test.mjs tools/local-stack.test.mjs tools/run-api-tests.test.mjs tools/run-smtp-check.test.mjs
scripts.rust:check: pnpm run rust:fmt && pnpm run rust:clippy && pnpm run rust:test
